title: A Contest for Passion and Promotion
article_text: It is a local contest that can fulfill a person's dream of winning a championship. Roughly one hundred people from every province gather to march in the annual competition. A wealthy sponsor announced the prize: a mortgage-free house for the champion. During the evaluation, each contestant must demonstrate their unique passion and skill. One participant glanced at the salt on the table and used it to create a tiny opera stage. Another dedicated her performance to her father, a former champion who taught her to never compromise her art. The judges had to compromise on the final scores after a long discussion. The winner's announcement caused a violent reaction from the crowd, but it was the champion's weakness that made him humble. After the contest, the champion began to dust his old trophy collection and plan his future. He hoped to use his promotion to accomplish more for his community and increase awareness of local art and architecture.

quiz.question_en: Which word means 'to make a dream or goal come true'?
Which word refers to 'a government division of a country, like Guangdong'?
Which word means 'to give up something to reach an agreement'?
Which word refers to 'a type of play where people sing'?

image_prompts: A large stage with a banner reading 'Local Talent Contest' and a crowd of people sitting in chairs, with a spotlit area in the center.
A long line of people from different provinces walking together on a road, each carrying a small flag with their province name.
A wealthy person in a suit holding a large check with 'Mortgage-Free House' written on it, standing next to a smiling champion.
A judge sitting at a table with papers, watching a performer on stage with a serious expression.
A person on stage looking at a small pile of salt on a table, with a tiny opera stage made of salt nearby.
A performer bowing on stage while a picture of her father, an older champion, is projected behind her.
Three judges sitting around a table, pointing at score sheets and talking with serious faces.
A champion on a podium with a gold medal, while some people in the crowd look angry and shout.
A champion holding a dust cloth, cleaning a shelf full of old trophies in a room.
A champion speaking to a group of people in a community center, with pictures of local buildings on the wall behind him.
